titleStmt.title: SII 38.368: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 368. (A.R. No. 368 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Kṛishṇayadeva-Mahārāya Year: Śaka 144[4], Vikrama, Kumbha, śu. 10. Saturday. uṇarpūsam = 16th February 1521 A.D. f.d.n. 41.

summary.p: Records that Ammaiyappanāyiṉār, son of Mārappar, a shepherd of Dēvakkāpuram, a tirunāmakkāṇi (village), granted a village Ūvattūr and also its hamlet Suraipāḍi of Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam to the god Tirumalar-uḍaiyanayiṉār in Dēvakkāpuram, a village situated in the southern division of Śeyyāṟu in Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻamaṇḍalam. It further records that he endowed these two villages as tirunāmakkāṇi to the god for the merit of Kṛishṇadēva-mahārāya. Īśānaśivāchāriyar, a pontiff of Bhikshāmaṭham, temple officials (tāṉamāyēśvarar), and weavers (kaikkōḷa-mudaḷigal) in turn gave these two villages as lease (kāṇippaṟṟu) to the donor. He was given the right of inducting cultivators (kuḍiyumī-ēṟṟi) (to cultivate the land) and also the right to enjoy the land with eight kinds of privileges (ashṭabhōgam). It is also recorded that all the taxes such as vāśalkaḍamai, peṟkaḍamai, taṟikaḍami, śekkoṭṭu, paṭṭaḍai, nūlāyam, kāṇikkai, kaṭṭāyam, sandai, ērimīṉvilai, kamugu, teṉṉamaram, vāḻai, karumbu, mañjaḷ iñji, māvaḍai, maravaḍai, kōpura-vāsalil pirakkum, paḻavari, puduvari and other taxes were waived. Instead the leasee, was to remit 100 paṇam and 120 kalam of paddy annually at the temple treasury for the special worship of the god Tirumalar-uḍaiyanayiṉār commencing from the month of Māśi from the cyclic year Vikrama onwards. Besides this he was to enjoy this privilege hereditarily and was also given a house at Maniyakārateruvu.

Īśānaśivāchāriyar, the pontiff of Bhikshā-maṭham at Dēvikkāpuram, Karaiēṟavīṭṭār Chandranambi, the tāṉattār, Āḻvār Tirumalai Nayiṉār, and several others including the temple accountant Uttaṇḍi figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvara metiṉimicura kaṇḍakaṭṭāri cāḷuva śrīvirapiṟatāpa śrīkiṟuṣṇayatevamahārāyar piṟutivi rāciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa jagāṟtuRead cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 4 10 4 mel
cellā niṉṟa vikkuṟamasamvaṟcarattu kumbhanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu dacamiyum caṉivāramu peṟṟa puṇarpūcanakṣatra(ṟa)ttuṉāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇḍalattu palkuṉṟakoṭṭattu
melkuṉṟa nāṭu murukamaṅkalapaṟṟu Irācakempiraṉmalaikku Aṭuttapaṟṟu ceyyāṟṟukku teṉpirivāna tevakkāpuram Uṭaiyār tirumalar vuṭaiya nayiṉāṟku tirunāmakāṇi
Āka tevakkāpuram maṉṟāṭikaḷil mārappar makaṉ Ammaiyappa nayiṉār kiruṣṇayatevamahāirāyar taṉmamāka Immaṇḍalattil Ippaṟṟil viṭṭa kiṟāmam Ūvattūr kiṟāmam Oṉṟu
Itil piṭākai curaipāṭiyum Uḷpaṭa kiṟāmam Oṉṟu tirumalarvuṭaiya nayiṉār tirunāmakāṇi Āka nāṉ viṭukaiyil tevakkāpuram pikṣā maṭam Icāṉacivācāriyarum tāṉa(m) māyecurarum
kaikoḷa mutalikaḷu Āka Ivvaṉai varuṣam mārappar makaṉ Ammaiyappa nayiṉāṟku kāṇippaṟṟu Āka paṇṇi kuṭuttom nāṅkaḷ kāṇippaṟṟu paṇṇi kuṭukkaiyil Ivar
Anta 2 100(1/4) tū » Itil piṭākai curaipāṭiyum veṇṭiṉa kuṭiyum Eṟṟikoṇṭu nañcai puñcai nāṟpāṟkellaiyum Uḷpaṭa niti nikṣepam Akṣiṇiākāmi cittacāttiyam jalap
pāṣāṇam Eṉṉappaṭṭa Aṣṭabhoka tecacuvāmiyaṅkaḷum Uḷpaṭavum vācalkaṭamai peṟkaṭamai taṟikaṭamai cekkoṭṭu palataḷi paṭṭaṭai nūlāyam kāṇikkai kaṭṭāyam cantai
Ērimiṉ vilai kamuku teṉṉamaram vāḻai karumpu mañcaḷ Iñci māvaṭai maravaṭai kopuravācalil piṟakkum piḻavariRead paḻavariputuvari maṟṟu Eppeṟpaṭṭa cakalavakaiyum Uḷpaṭṭa maṉai Āṅkaṭṭu kuttakai Āka
koyilpaṇṭārattukku vikkuṟama varuṣam māci mātam mutalāka varuṣam Oṉṟukku tirumalarvuṭaiya nāyiṉār mahāpūcaikku celuttum 1 100 2 10ṛ cūla kālāl ḷa 100 2 1000 Inta mātam 100 2 10m ḷa 10000 2 1000 mutalāka koyil
paṇṭārattukku kantāyapiṟāttiyile paṇamum celutti nellu Aḷakka kaṭavarākavum Inta 1 100 2 10m ḷa 10000 2 1000mutalāka vikkiṟamavaruṣam māci mātam mutalāka Eṉṟu Eṉṟaikku varuṣavaruṣa
Ilaka varuṣa varuṣantoṟu mukkantāyam Āka celuttakaṭavarākavum Inta kāṇippaṟṟu puttiṟapavuttiṟapāramparaiyāka cantiṟā Ātitta varaiyum Aṉupavittukoḷḷakkaṭavarākavum
Inta kāṇippaṟṟukku Āka Itaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṭṭa maṉai maṇiyakāṟa teruvile vaṭaciṟakile melai koṭiyil maṉai Oṉṟum Aṉupavittu koḷḷakkaṭavarākavum Ippaṭi
cammatittu Ammaiyappanayiṉāṟku kāṇippaṟṟu paṇṇikuṭuttom tevakkāpuram pikṣāmaṭam Icāṉa civācāriyar Eḻuttu tāṉattār karaieṟa viṭṭār cantiranampi Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu Āḻvārtirumalai
nayiṉār Eḻuttu māyecurar tirumalaicivaṉ kaṇkāṇi civaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu kaikoḷamutalikaḷ Icura kaḷappāḷar naraciṅka kāliṅkarāyar nāvilaṅkātār Appanāyiṉār kollāviṭṭār tampirān toḻar
vallāṉai veṉṟār kaṇṭiyatevar veṭanayiṉār Uḷḷiṭṭa kai koḷamutalikaḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku vuttaṇṭi Eḻuttu IntataṉmattukkuStops here.
Digital edition of SII 38.368 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
